name: Fried Pepper Strips for Two
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the egg, cream cheese, and self-raising flour in a bowl, mixing well.
2. Dip the green pepper strips into the mixture, turning to coat evenly.
3. Heat the vegetable oil in a frying pan until hot (375°F).
4. Fry the coated pepper strips in the hot oil until golden brown.
5. Drain the strips on paper towels.
6. Sprinkle with salt and pepper if desired.
Yield: 2 servings.
